title: MMO Experience
description: Enhance the vanilla experience by removing orbs, modifying XP values and sources and create a true RPG style levelling system
body:
# MMO Experience

MMO Experience transforms Minecraft’s vanilla experience system into a dynamic, RPG-inspired progression system. Designed for **Paper MC**, this plugin provides server admins with the tools to create engaging, balanced gameplay that enhances player progression.

---

## Key Features

| **Feature**                 | **Description**                                                                                              |
|-----------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Dynamic XP Distribution** | Distribute XP fairly among players based on their contribution to mob kills, promoting teamwork and fairness.|
| **Lag-Free XP Handling**    | Eliminates XP orbs, applying experience directly to players for reduced lag and smoother gameplay.          |
| **Custom XP Scaling**       | Adjust XP rewards with a global multiplier, allowing complete control over progression speed.               |
| **Creative XP Toggle**      | Easily enable or disable XP gains in Creative mode to fit your server’s needs.                             |
| **Free Enchanting & Repairs** | Allow players to enchant and repair items without consuming XP, ideal for creative or progression servers. |
| **Global XP Control**       | Disable all XP rewards globally for unique gameplay experiences, such as challenge servers.                |
| **Reward Challenges**       | Grant XP for completing in-game tasks or achievements, adding depth to player progression.                 |
| **XP Retention**            | Prevent XP loss on death, encouraging risk-taking and exploration.                                         |
| **Seamless Config Updates** | Automatically merges new settings into existing configurations, keeping your setup current without hassle. |
| **Debug Mode**              | Enable detailed logs for troubleshooting and diagnostics.                                                  |
| **bStats Integration**      | Gain insights into plugin usage and configuration preferences with advanced metrics.                       |

---

## Why MMO Experience?

- **Performance-Optimised**: Removes experience orbs for better server performance, especially during mob-heavy events.
- **RPG-Inspired Gameplay**: Create immersive progression systems tailored for RPG, economy, or adventure servers.
- **Easy Configuration**: Adaptable options for any server style, from casual to hardcore.

---

## Recent Updates (v1.0.3)

| **Update**                        | **Description**                                                                                     |
|-----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **Dynamic Config Updates**        | New settings are merged seamlessly into your configuration without overwriting custom values.       |
| **Refactored Codebase**           | A complete overhaul for improved stability, clarity, and maintainability.                          |
| **Enhanced XP Customisation**     | New options to control XP for Creative mode, repairs, disenchanting, and a global scaling factor.   |
| **Improved Metrics Integration**  | bStats integration provides detailed plugin analytics.                                             |

---

## Get Involved!

- **Feedback Welcome**: Share your suggestions or feature requests on our Discord.
- **Support Development**: Enable bStats to help us continue improving the plugin.
